ext.description: Sidebar view that sorts workspace files by line count to surface refactor targets.
view.container.title: Vibecode File Lines
view.lineRanking.name: Line Ranking
config.topN: Maximum number of files to show in the flat ranking view.
config.warnThreshold: Files at or above this line count are visually highlighted.
config.maxFileSizeKB: Files larger than this size are skipped without reading.
config.defaultGrouping: Initial view mode: flat ranking or grouped by extension.
config.additionalBinaryExtensions: Additional extensions to treat as binary (with leading dot, e.g. ".bin").
cmd.toggleView: Vibecode - Toggle Line Ranking View Mode
